data.title: Alibaba’s annual international sales surge 25%
data.description: Even though Alibaba.com made less money this year, the company is sticking with it for the long haul. CEO Eddie Wu said cross-border trade remains a big opportunity.

data.title: Henry Schein grows profit as ecommerce push accelerates
data.description: New automation features — such as the ability to attach dental images to insurance claims — are helping streamline administrative workflows and speed up reimbursement cycles.

data.title: Napster relaunches as an AI company and bets on agentic tools
data.description: Infinite Reality, a firm known for its immersive digital media and spatial computing technologies, announced it is rebranding as Napster Corp. and launching a new AI division.

data.title: Dick's Sporting Goods announces acquisition of Foot Locker
data.description: The transaction would make Dick's Sporting Goods an international retailer with access to about 2,400 more store locations.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: Retailers with this omnichannel feature have the highest conversion rates
data.description: Omnichannel features broadly were associated with better conversion in 2024, but one option outperformed the rest.
